title: Move whale-says test to end of baseline
body:
Signed-off-by: TomSweeneyRedHat <tsweeney@redhat.com>

Moves the "whale-says" test to the last position in the test_podman_baseline.sh test script.  It just makes it easier to see the graphic from that test and to then know it's completed.  Added notes in the script asking for it to remain there going forward.

comments.body: Forgot to add, this script is only run "by hand" and not by the CI tests.

:pushpin: Commit 1f59b9c has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 1f59b9c66c36a914356ba5750c8b77e38c9b5e20 -->
:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
